0.response: {"Q0":"No, I didn't use a specific strategy. I just tried to really focus on the game and my eye/hand coordination."}

7.response: {"Q0":"I didn't really feel I was being guided by anything really, I just chose what I felt I wanted in the moment."}

9.response: {"Q0":"No, nothing. They were just very lengthy is all. "}

5.response: {"Q0":"As stated a minute ago, I did make that mistake for one round, but then noticed and started doing it correctly."}

2.response: {"Q0":"I would say anywhere from 6-8 times per gem, per round."}

8.response: {"Q0":"I was REALLY focused on everything as a whole. I don't feel I would've done well at all if I didn't."}

3.response: {"Q0":"Yes. I did. But I did forget for a moment when on the planets. But started doing it correctly when I remembered."}

11.response: {"Q0":"Very cute game. The first thing I did when the game popped up, is smile. Thank you very much for the experience. :)"}
